title: 5 Stocks That Just Increased Their Dividends
text: Of late, Wells Fargo (WFC), Matador Resources (MTDR), Cintas (CTAS), Truist Financial (TFC) and MSCI (MSCI) have increased their dividend payments.

title: MSCI Inc.'s (MSCI) Management on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: MSCI Inc. (NYSE:MSCI ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 26, 2022 10:30 AM ET Company Participants Jeremy Ulan – Head of Investor Relations and Treasurer Baer Pettit – President and Chief Operating Officer Andy Wiechmann – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Manav Patnaik – Barclays Alex Kramm – UBS Toni Kaplan – Morgan Stanley George Tong – Goldman Sachs Russell Quelch – Redburn Craig Huber – Huber Research Partners Patrick O'Shaughnessy – Raymond James Gregory Simpson – BNP Paribas Ashish Sabadra – RBC Capital Markets Operator Good day, and welcome to the MSCI Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. All participants will be in a listen-only mode.

title: MSCI Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Recurring Subscriptions Up
text: MSCI's second-quarter 2022 results benefit from strong growth in recurring subscription revenues.

title: MSCI (MSCI) Tops Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: MSCI (MSCI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.96% and 1.58%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: MSCI Reports Financial Results for Second Quarter and Six Months 2022
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--MSCI Inc. (“MSCI” or the “Company”) (NYSE: MSCI), a leading provider of critical decision support tools and services for the global investment community, today announced its financial results for the three months ended June 30, 2022 (“second quarter 2022”) and six months ended June 30, 2022 (“six months 2022”). title: MSCI Announces Time Change for its Earnings Call to Review Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--MSCI Inc. (NYSE: MSCI), a leading provider of critical decision support tools and services for the global investment community, today announced that it has changed the timing of its previously announced earnings conference call. MSCI's senior management will now review second quarter 2022 results on Tuesday, July 26, 2022 at 10:30 AM Eastern Time. title: MSCI Appoints Cristina Bondolowski as Chief Marketing Officer
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--MSCI Inc. (NYSE: MSCI), a leading provider of critical decision support tools and services for the global investment community, announced today that Cristina Bondolowski has joined the firm as Chief Marketing Officer and as a member of MSCI's Executive Committee. Ms. Bondolowski will be responsible for the strategic development and execution of MSCI's global marketing and communications programs in support of the firm's global growth initiatives and client focus areas

title: MSCI Schedules Earnings Call to Review Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--MSCI Inc. (NYSE: MSCI), a leading provider of critical decision support tools and services for the global investment community, announced today it will release its results for the second quarter 2022 on Tuesday, July 26, 2022, before the market opens. A copy of the earnings release, as well as an earnings presentation and a quarterly update, will be made available on MSCI's Investor Relations website.
